return(function(X,k,m,D,Z,b,e,A,H,n,O,I,T,s,W,Q,C,P,i,Y,j,L,K,o)O,i,T,C,o,Q,A,s,K,n,H,I,Y,L,W,P,j=function()s=(-385616+385617)+s C[s]=976909+-976908 return s end,function(X,f)local k=L(f)local
